nameMeanings.name: Moton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably also an altered form of English   Morton  .

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery Moton was born in 1396, in Yorkshire, England, her father, Sir Robert Moton, was 21 and her mother, Cicely Knyveton, was 11. She had at least 3 sons with William Purefoy IV. She died in 1470, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery Moton est née en 1396, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert Moton, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Cicely Knyveton, avait 11 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils avec William Purefoy IV. Elle est décédée en 1470, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 74 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margery Moton 1396 in Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Robert Moton 21 und ihre Mutter Cicely Knyveton 11. Sie hatte mit William Purefoy IV mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb 1470 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Moton è nata il nel 1396 nel Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Sir Robert Moton, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Cicely Knyveton, aveva 11 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli con William Purefoy IV. Morì nel 1470, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 74 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery Motonが1396年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Motonは21歳，母Cicely Knyvetonは11歳であった。彼女はWilliam Purefoy IVとの間に少なくとも3人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1470年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery Moton(이)가 1396년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert Moton(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Cicely Knyveton(은)는 11세였다. 그녀는 William Purefoy IV(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1470년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Moton nasceu em 1396, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert Moton, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Cicely Knyveton, tinha 11 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos com William Purefoy IV. Ela faleceu em 1470, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 74 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery Moton родилась в 1396 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Robert Moton было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Cicely Knyveton, 11. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына от William Purefoy IV. Она умерла в 1470 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 74 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margery Moton nació en 1396, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Robert Moton, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Cicely Knyveton, tenía 11 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos con William Purefoy IV. Murió en 1470, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 74 años.
